  handoff Orchestrator -> SchemaLinker

    -> cards(id*, artist, asciiName, availability, borderColor, cardKingdomFoilId, cardKingdomId, colorIdentity, colorIndicator, colors, convertedManaCost, duelDeck, edhrecRank, faceConvertedManaCost, faceName, flavorName, flavorText, frameEffects, frameVersion, hand, hasAlternativeDeckLimit, hasContentWar
  [SchemaLinker] sample_rows({"table":"cards","limit":20})

  handoff SchemaLinker -> SQLWriter
  handoff SQLWriter -> Validator
  [Validator] validate_sql({"sql":"SELECT\nCASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN isTextless = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN 0.0\nELSE 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN isTextless = 1 AND layout = 'normal' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN isTextless = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)\nEND AS proportion\nFROM cards;"})
    -> OK: parses as a single read-only SELECT.
  [Validator] execute_sql({"sql":"SELECT\nCASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN isTextless = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN 0.0\nELSE 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN isTextless = 1 AND layout = 'normal' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN isTextless = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)\nEND AS proportion\nFROM cards;"})
    -> 1 rows in 0.27s
proportion
100.0
  handoff Validator -> Summarizer
SQL ATTEMPTS:
  [ok] SELECT
CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN isTextless = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN 0.0
ELSE 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN isTextless = 1 AND layout = 'normal' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN isTextless = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
END AS proportion
FROM cards;
FINAL ANSWER: 100.0% of cards that are textless have a layout of 'normal' (proportion = 100.0).

SQL used:
```
SELECT
CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN isTextless = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN 0.0
ELSE 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN isTextless = 1 AND layout = 'normal' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN isTextless = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
END AS proportion
FROM cards;
```

QUESTION: Which schools served a grade span of Kindergarten to 9th grade in the county of Los Angeles and what is its Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)?
DATABASE: california_schools
STATUS: max_turns
EXEC_MATCH: False
TRAJECTORY:
SQL ATTEMPTS:
  [ok] SELECT "School Name",
CASE WHEN "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" > 0
     THEN ("FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)" * 1.0) / "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" * 100
     ELSE NULL END AS "Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)"
FROM frpm
WHERE "County Name" = 'Los Angeles'
  AND "Low Grade" = 'K'
  AND "High Grade" = '9'
ORDER BY "School Name";
  [ok] SELECT DISTINCT "County Name"
FROM frpm
WHERE "County Name" LIKE '%Los%'
ORDER BY "County Name";
  [ok] SELECT DISTINCT "Low Grade", "High Grade"
FROM frpm
WHERE "County Name" = 'Los Angeles'
ORDER BY "Low Grade", "High Grade";
  [ok] SELECT DISTINCT "Low Grade", "High Grade"
FROM frpm
WHERE "County Name" = 'Los Angeles'
  AND "High Grade" = '9'
ORDER BY "Low Grade", "High Grade";
  [ok] SELECT DISTINCT "Low Grade"
FROM frpm
ORDER BY "Low Grade";
  [ok] SELECT DISTINCT GSserved FROM schools ORDER BY GSserved;
  [ok] SELECT DISTINCT GSserved FROM schools WHERE GSserved LIKE '%K%' ORDER BY GSserved;
FINAL ANSWER: The pipeline exceeded its turn budget before producing an answer.
